chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 66 – The Indication and the wordings upon Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/291)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/291)
text: إِنَّ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( صلوات الله عليه ) لَمَّا حَضَرَهُ الَّذِي حَضَرَهُ قَالَ لِابْنِهِ الْحَسَنِ ادْنُ مِنِّي حَتَّى أُسِرَّ إِلَيْكَ مَا أَسَرَّ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِلَيَّ وَ أَئْتَمِنَكَ عَلَى مَا ائْتَمَنَنِي عَلَيْهِ فَفَعَلَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdul Samad Bin Bashir, from Abu Al Jaroud,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup>, when there presented to him<sup>asws</sup> that which presented (death), said to his<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup> Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>: ‘Approach me<sup>asws</sup> until I<sup>asws</sup> divulge a secret to you<sup>asws</sup> what Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> had divulged to me<sup>asws</sup>, and entrust you<sup>asws</sup> upon what he<sup>saww</sup> entrusted me<sup>saww</sup> upon’. So he<sup>asws</sup> did’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from’’Abd al-Samad ibn Bashir from abu al-Jarud from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “When Amir al-Mu’minin Ali (a.s.) was about to leave this world, he called his son, al-Hassan (a.s.) saying, “ Come very close to me so I can speak to you secretly just as the Messenger of Allah did to me and entrust you with all that he entrusted me with and he did so.”
